rationale: Clear, well-organized explainer with a strong fridge-in-reverse analogy and useful homeowner-focused comparisons. It is slightly more polished and promotional than plainspoken, with some inflated phrasing and a bit more detail than necessary, but it stays informative and easy to follow.
